statement: Autosave debounce — Use a short debounce before saving after edits. Exact duration is implementation-level, — Affects autosave hook and save status UI.
affected_modules: src/services/builder.service.ts; src/services/versions.service.ts; autosave hooks; src/utils/export.helpers.ts; src/utils/import.helpers.ts; local cache
ux_impact: User sees changes saved soon after editing.
